hooks.command: echo '[Paper] HTML/XML modified. Verify: - Semantic tags (header/main/nav/section/footer) - Alt text on images - ARIA labels on interactive elements - Heading hierarchy (h1>h2>h3) - Touch targets >= 44x44px - Form labels associated with inputs'

echo '[Paper] Stylesheet modified. Verify: - Color contrast >= 4.5:1 for text - Use relative units (rem/em) over fixed px - Use max-width not width for containers - Consistent spacing (4px/8px grid) - Focus styles on interactive elements - prefers-reduced-motion for animations'
